privileged_info_summary: The task operates on '0001.vital', a real data file downloaded from the VitalDB open dataset (exactly 21,063,820 bytes). Analysis of the file confirms it contains actual waveform traces from a noncardiac surgery at Seoul National University Hospital, including arterial pressure (SNUADC/ART), ECG leads (SNUADC/ECG_II, SNUADC/ECG_V5), pulse oximetry (SNUADC/PLETH), capnography (Primus/CO2), and airway pressure (Primus/AWP). The task uses real-world clinical data. There are no explicit metadata claims in task.json to evaluate.
